owner_operator_stated: Dr. John S. Waters, DDS (practice is named after and led by him; practicing in Sandwich since 1993)
notes: Website domain watersdentalgroup.com corroborated by search-indexed content showing exact phone (815) 786-2146 and address 420 E Church St, Sandwich, IL 60548 (matches vendor hint). Direct WebFetch of the site (homepage, contact-us, about-us, general-dentistry pages) returned empty content each attempt, likely bot/JS protection — could not confirm an on-site roster page or careers/hiring link directly, so doctor roster is sourced from third-party listings (Healthgrades/Yelp) rather than the site itself. No DSO/multi-location signal found.

owner_operator_stated: Site describes itself as 'locally owned and operated dentistry' but does not name a specific individual owner
notes: Corroborated by exact address (28365 Davis Pkwy Ste 206, Warrenville, IL 60555) and phone ((630) 836-8995) shown on the practice's own homepage; matches vendor hint. Site markets itself as 'locally owned and operated' but its own Careers page routes to Elite Dental Partners LLC's Greenhouse job board, which currently lists one open Dental Hygienist role specifically tagged to Warrenville, IL -- a signal this practice may be affiliated with/managed by Elite Dental Partners, a multi-location dental group, despite the independent-sounding branding.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Amanpreet (Preet) Singh, DDS -- practice registered as Amanpreet Singh DDS PC, d/b/a Warrenville Dental Group
notes: Exact address (28W530 Batavia Rd, Warrenville, IL 60555) and phone ((630) 393-4600, fax 393-4690) corroborated across multiple directory listings tied to warrenvilledentalgroup.com, matching vendor hint. Direct WebFetch of the site failed with a TLS certificate error (ERR_TLS_CERT_ALTNAME_INVALID) on our end, not evidence the site is down -- search engines have it indexed live with a 'Meet The Doctor' page. Roster (Dr. Singh + Dr. Puleo) sourced from business-specific third-party listings rather than a direct page load. No DSO/multi-location signal found; one search result mentioned additional Singh-branded locations in Shorewood/Peoria but this was not corroborated on the practice's own site.

public_practice_name: DeLacey Dental (Thomas J. DeLacey, DDS & Bryce A. Larson, DMD)
owner_operator_stated: Thomas J. DeLacey, DDS & Bryce A. Larson, DMD, co-owners of the practice
notes: Corroborated by exact address (28377 Davis Parkway, Warrenville, IL 60555) and phone ((630) 836-8880) shown directly on the site's Meet The Team page; matches vendor hint delaceydental.com. No careers/hiring page found in navigation. Independent two-doctor practice; no DSO/multi-location signal found.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Steven B. Schroyer, DDS, has owned the practice since 1994; his son Dr. Connor Schroyer, DMD, joined as an associate in summer 2023
notes: vendor_website_hint 'Kiziororthodontics.Com' was WRONG -- that domain belongs to an unrelated orthodontics practice and was not used. Correct site (schroyerdental.com) found via web search, and it directly shows the exact address (4365 Lawn Avenue, Suite 3, Western Springs, IL 60558) and phone ((708) 246-4320). No careers/hiring page; independent father-son doctor-owned practice, no DSO/multi-location signal found.

owner_operator_stated: Record entity 'Timothy Kitley DMD PC' at 700 E Ogden Ave, Westmont, IL 60559: the record's exact phone (630) 789-1555 now belongs to a DIFFERENT practice, Jason Hong DDS & Kathy Lam DDS PC, at 700 E. Ogden Ave., Suite 307, Westmont, IL 60559 (confirmed on jasonandkathydds.com/contact-us). Separately, a dentist of the same name, Dr. Timothy A. Kitley, DMD, now appears to practice pediatric dentistry as 'Kids Rock Pediatric Dentistry' at 700 E Ogden Ave, Suite 110, Westmont, IL 60559, phone (630) 986-1234 (dinorockdentist.com) -- a different suite and phone than the record, so this could not be corroborated as the same PC/location.
notes: SUCCESSOR/OWNERSHIP CONFLICT. 700 E Ogden Ave, Westmont, IL 60559 is a multi-suite medical/dental building housing at least three unrelated dental practices: Kathryn L. Grady, DDS (Suite 302, phone 630-789-3903, grady.dental -- vendor_website_hint 'Gradydental.Com' also points here and is likewise NOT the record's practice), Jason Hong DDS & Kathy Lam DDS PC (Suite 307, phone (630) 789-1555 -- this IS the record's exact phone number), and Kids Rock Pediatric Dentistry / Dr. Timothy A. Kitley, DMD (Suite 110, phone (630) 986-1234). Because the record's exact phone now rings a different named practice (Jason Hong & Kathy Lam DDS PC) than the record entity (Timothy Kitley DMD PC), and the same-named dentist's current practice uses a different phone/suite that could not be independently matched to the record, neither the vendor hint nor any found site could be corroborated to this specific record per the corroboration rule. No web search was found explicitly documenting a sale/succession between Kitley and Hong/Lam.
